---
# title-block-banner: images/banner3.png
# title-block-banner: logo_alt/im-horizontal.svg
# title-block-banner: "#003257"
# title-block-banner-color: "#FFFFFF"
hide-hidden: true
hide-exam: true
# title: "&nbsp;"
# subtitle: "&nbsp;"
title-block-banner: "#ffffffff"
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffffff"


listing:
  - id: showcase
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title]
    grid-columns: 2
    contents:
      - notebooks/getting_started.ipynb
      - notebooks/lists.ipynb
    # sort: "date desc"
    # categories: true
    # sort-ui: true
    # filter-ui: true
    # fields: [image, title, description]

format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
            color: #ffffff;
          }
          .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
            height: 0;
            min-height: 0;
            padding: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
          #title-block-header {
            background-image: url(./logo/im-horizontal.svg);
            # background-size: cover;
            # background-size: contain;
            /* im-horizontal.svg is 1647x198; cap the width so the 80%-scaled
               image never renders taller than the 200px header on wide screens */
            background-size: min(70%, calc(200px * 1647 / 198)) auto;
            background-color: #F0F2F4;
            background-repeat: no-repeat;
            background-position-x: center;
            background-position-y: center;
            height: 200px;
            opacity: 1; /* Adjust as needed */
            z-index: -1;
          </style>
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

::: {.panel-tabset group="role"}

## <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Students

*Instructing Machines* is a collection of lecture notes, slides, exercises, tutorials, projects.


## <i class="bi bi-bank"></i> Educators

*Instructing Machines* is a collection of lecture notes, slides, exercises, tutorials, projects.

It was made for the [Bioinformatics course]() at [Aarhus University]() teaching undergraduates in [Molecular Biology and Molecular Medicine](). If you teach a similar course, feel free to [fork it]() and make your own.

- *Veronica Schmetterling*

:::

# Mind maps and resources {.unnumbered}
